title: assessor-profile
description: Resolved assessor mandate — type, institutional context, priorities, non-negotiables, and firm-specific standards. Produced by criteria-resolver from uploaded criteria document and/or structured dialogue. Confirmed at Confirmation Point 1.

assessor_type.description: Resolved assessor type — determines report format, scoring calibration, and domain weight adjustments.

report_format.description: Report format determined from assessor type: VC/Angel/PE → investment-memorandum; Credit/Debt → credit-memorandum; Corporate/Strategic/SWF/Family-office → strategic-assessment.

transaction_type.description: Specific transaction type (e.g., 'seed equity investment', 'convertible note', 'growth equity acquisition', 'venture debt facility', 'strategic partnership', 'board seat consideration', etc.)

institutional_context.description: Assessor's institutional context if provided (e.g., fund thesis, portfolio focus, sector expertise, geographic mandate).

primary_priorities.description: Top assessment priorities for this assessor type — ordered by importance.

weight_modifier.description: Multiplier applied to base domain weight. 1.0 = no change; >1.0 = elevated; <1.0 = reduced.

non_negotiables.description: Assessment criteria that are non-negotiable — items that, if absent, result in an automatic flag.

firm_specific_standards.description: Any firm-specific standards or thresholds provided by the assessor.

stage_priorities.description: Assessor's confirmed adjustments to default stage-based scoring weights.

resolution_method.description: How the assessor's mandate was established.

criteria_document_reference.description: Filename of the uploaded criteria document, if provided.

dialogue_summary.description: Summary of the structured dialogue conducted to resolve criteria, if applicable.

confirmation_status.description: Whether this profile has been confirmed at Confirmation Point 1.
